metadata.description: Claude Code skills for AI-driven solo developers shipping npm packages.

plugins.name: solo-npm
plugins.description: Nine slash commands for the full npm publishing lifecycle: bootstrap (init, trust), per-release (release, verify), lifecycle transitions (prerelease, hotfix), portfolio operations (status, audit, deps). OIDC + provenance; AI-driven solo-dev workflows. Composes with addyosmani/agent-skills for development phases.
